mapper.select:
select li.entryid, ui.name as username, li.count, DATE_FORMAT(li.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as date, li.orderid, li.location from in_library li inner join user_info ui on ui.userid = li.userid
li.userid = #{userid}
and li.entryid like CONCAT('%', #{entryid}, '%')
and li.orderid like CONCAT('%', #{orderid}, '%')
and li.location like CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
and li.count = #{count}
and li.time BETWEEN CONCAT(#{date}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{date}, ' 23:59:59')
and ui.name like CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
